summary: Completed comprehensive testing of flooring store management MVP. Backend APIs are fully functional (96.6% success rate). Frontend loads and basic functionality works, but has critical Select component errors affecting complex forms.

minor_issues.issue: Returns PDF binary data instead of JSON (expected behavior)

critical_bugs.issue: React runtime error: SelectItem must have a value prop that is not an empty string
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents complex forms (invoice creation, product management) from working properly

auth_issues.issue: New registered users show as 'Employee' instead of 'Owner' even when they should be first user
auth_issues.impact: First user not getting owner privileges, settings locked

ui_bugs.issue: Save button properly hidden for employees, but role assignment issue affects this

passed_tests: Simple form submissions (leads without complex selects)
Backend: All CRUD APIs for products, customers, invoices, leads, expenses, contractors
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix SelectItem component errors preventing complex forms from working. The React error shows 'SelectItem must have a value prop that is not an empty string'. Also investigate why new users are getting 'Employee' role instead of 'Owner' role. Invoice creation, product management, and other forms with Select components are currently broken.
